questions: What are typical Facebook Ads benchmarks by industry?
How should we use Facebook benchmarks in practice?
qa.answer: Benchmarks provide average CPM, CPC, CTR, and conversion rates by industry, but vary by objective, audience, and creative. Use as directional checks, not hard targets.
implication: Compare to relevant vertical/geo/objective; avoid chasing global medians.
Diagnose outliers by checking creative, audience fit, landing pages.
Anchor decisions on CAC, payback, and incrementality.
